'''nokachaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:vulnurable|vulnurable]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-k-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vulnurable|vulnurable]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| nokachaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:nokachithi|nokachithi]] || [[word:nokachiji|nokachiji]] || [[word:nokachishi|nokachishi]] || [[word:nokachiki|nokachiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:nokachuthuthu|nokachuthuthu]] || [[word:nokachujuju|nokachujuju]] || [[word:nokachushushu|nokachushushu]] || [[word:nokachukuku|nokachukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:nokachuthu|nokachuthu]] || [[word:nokachuju|nokachuju]] || [[word:nokachushu|nokachushu]] || [[word:nokachuku|nokachuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:nokachufthuf|nokachufthuf]] || [[word:nokachufjuf|nokachufjuf]] || [[word:nokachufshuf|nokachufshuf]] || [[word:nokachufkuf|nokachufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:nokachethe|nokachethe]] || [[word:nokacheje|nokacheje]] || [[word:nokacheshe|nokacheshe]] || [[word:nokacheke|nokacheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:nokachothotho|nokachothotho]] || [[word:nokachojojo|nokachojojo]] || [[word:nokachoshosho|nokachoshosho]] || [[word:nokachokoko|nokachokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:nokachotho|nokachotho]] || [[word:nokachojo|nokachojo]] || [[word:nokachosho|nokachosho]] || [[word:nokachoko|nokachoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:nokachofthof|nokachofthof]] || [[word:nokachofjof|nokachofjof]] || [[word:nokachofshof|nokachofshof]] || [[word:nokachofkof|nokachofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:nokachïfthïf|nokachïfthïf]] || [[word:nokachïfjïf|nokachïfjïf]] || [[word:nokachïfshïf|nokachïfshïf]] || [[word:nokachïfkïf|nokachïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:nokachïfthïfthïf|nokachïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:nokachïfjïfjïf|nokachïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:nokachïfshïfshïf|nokachïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:nokachïfkïfkïf|nokachïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:nokachïfthïf|nokachïfthïf]] || [[word:nokachïfjïf|nokachïfjïf]] || [[word:nokachïfshïf|nokachïfshïf]] || [[word:nokachïfkïf|nokachïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:nokachïfthïf|nokachïfthïf]] || [[word:nokachïfjïf|nokachïfjïf]] || [[word:nokachïfshïf|nokachïfshïf]] || [[word:nokachïfkïf|nokachïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:nokachæthæ|nokachæthæ]] || [[word:nokachæjæ|nokachæjæ]] || [[word:nokachæshæ|nokachæshæ]] || [[word:nokachækæ|nokachækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:nokachathatha|nokachathatha]] || [[word:nokachajaja|nokachajaja]] || [[word:nokachashasha|nokachashasha]] || [[word:nokachakaka|nokachakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:nokachatha|nokachatha]] || [[word:nokachaja|nokachaja]] || [[word:nokachasha|nokachasha]] || [[word:nokachaka|nokachaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:nokachafthaf|nokachafthaf]] || [[word:nokachafjaf|nokachafjaf]] || [[word:nokachafshaf|nokachafshaf]] || [[word:nokachafkaf|nokachafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:nokachasha|nokachasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:nokachshësha|nokachshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nokachrosha|nokachrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nokachmusha|nokachmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:nokachyasha|nokachyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonokachnkshësha|gonokachnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonokachnkrosha|gonokachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonokachnkmusha|gonokachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonokachnkyasha|gonokachnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:nokakachasha|nokakachasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nokakachshësha|nokakachshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nokakachrosha|nokakachrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nokakachmusha|nokakachmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nokakachyasha|nokakachyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonokakachnkshësha|gonokakachnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonokakachnkrosha|gonokakachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonokakachnkmusha|gonokakachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonokakachnkyasha|gonokakachnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:nekæchasha|nekæchasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nekæchshësha|nekæchshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nekæchrosha|nekæchrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nekæchmusha|nekæchmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nekæchyasha|nekæchyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonekæchnkshësha|gonekæchnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonekæchnkrosha|gonekæchnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonekæchnkmusha|gonekæchnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonekæchnkyasha|gonekæchnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:nokfachasha|nokfachasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nokfachshësha|nokfachshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nokfachrosha|nokfachrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nokfachmusha|nokfachmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nokfachyasha|nokfachyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonokfachnkshësha|gonokfachnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonokfachnkrosha|gonokfachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonokfachnkmusha|gonokfachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonokfachnkyasha|gonokfachnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|16f482d}}
